headline: A Look At Clorox’s Valuation After Weak Q3 Results And A Lowered Full Year Outlook
summary: Why Clorox’s latest quarter has the stock back in focus Clorox (CLX) is back on many investors’ watchlists after weak third quarter results, a lowered full year outlook, dividend questions, and legal scrutiny all hit sentiment at roughly the same time. See our latest analysis for Clorox. The stock has been under pressure for some time, with a 90 day share price return of a 22.83% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of a 30.15% decline, as the weak third quarter, lowered outlook,...

headline: Morgan Stanley Sees Rising Cost Pressures for Clorox (CLX)
summary: The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 1, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) to $97 from $110. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The analyst said sales challenges are continuing, especially in the litter and […]

headline: Clorox Investigation Puts GOJO Deal Margins And Dividend Path In Focus
summary: A law firm has opened a securities fraud investigation into Clorox (NYSE:CLX) and its leadership following the company’s lowered full year outlook. The probe comes after Clorox reported margin pressure linked to the GOJO (Purell) acquisition and ongoing operational headwinds. Investors are also questioning the sustainability of Clorox’s dividend and its long term path toward potential Dividend King status. For shareholders, this investigation lands on top of a difficult run. NYSE:CLX closed...
